overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dystopian near-future London at night. The player character walks along wet city streets past memorials, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians while light rain creates reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside graffiti-covered memorial wall with candles

events.description: pedestrian with black umbrella passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall with memorial candles and flowers

notable_agents.action: walking with black umbrella, passing close to the player character

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in graffiti with memorial candles and flowers placed at its base
multi-story brick building with illuminated windows typical of London architecture
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered memorial wall adorned with candles. The wet pavement reflects the street lamps as a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by on the left. Historic brick buildings line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

events.description: character waits at red traffic light at intersection before proceeding
character begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at traffic light then crossing the wet street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sports car stopped at the red traffic light

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt road
illuminated advertising screen displaying various content

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses an urban intersection, waiting for the traffic light to change. A black sports car waits at the red light on the right. The scene opens up from the narrow sidewalk to a wider street with crosswalk markings and traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with digital advertising displays

events.description: passing illuminated digital advertising kiosk with changing purple and white content

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various digital billboards and bus stops

entered.detail: tall digital display showing advertisements with purple and white graphics
covered bus stop with glass panels and illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial corridor lined with bright digital advertising kiosks and billboards. The lighting shifts to a more neon quality from the electronic displays. A bus stop shelter is visible on the right as the character continues down the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with classical architecture and modern buildings

events.description: crossing wide intersection toward area with prominent classical round building
waiting for white car to pass before continuing across intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide intersection while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large circular building with classical columns and stone facade
contemporary building with illuminated glass windows
row of trees lining the far side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a major intersection featuring a prominent classical round building on the left and modern glass structures on the right. A white car passes through the intersection as the character navigates the crosswalk. Trees become visible in the distance on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban boulevard with distant city lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the tree-lined sidewalk with city lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: illuminated bus shelter visible down the street on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a broader boulevard lined with trees on the right side. The classical building falls behind as the street opens up to show distant city lights. The environment feels more spacious with the tree line now prominent along the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, memorial-lined sidewalk into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins by tracking the character past a graffiti-covered memorial wall adorned with candles, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of street lamps and historic brick buildings. As a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by on the left, the camera maintains its forward momentum, moving away from the narrow confines of the walkway. The scene then opens up as the character reaches a city crossing, shifting from the intimate scale of the sidewalk to a broader street view. Finally, the movement slows as the character waits at the traffic light beside a idling black sports car, with the view expanding to encompass the crosswalk markings and signals of the intersection.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial corridor that gradually opens into a spacious, tree-lined city boulevard. It begins by tracking the character past bright digital advertising kiosks and billboards, where the lighting takes on a vivid neon quality against the wet pavement and a bus stop shelter. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a major intersection where a classical round building on the left contrasts with modern glass structures on the right while a white car passes through the crosswalk. The camera then follows the character away from the intersection, leaving the classical architecture behind as the environment expands. Finally, the view opens up onto a broad boulevard where a prominent line of trees borders the sidewalk and distant city lights stretch across the horizon.
